name: ESP32-C3 SuperMini
notes: ESP32-C3 SuperMini: 22.5 x 18 mm, bare ESP32-C3 die with a PCB trace antenna, USB-C. 13 GPIOs on two 8-pin castellated rows at 2.54 mm.
Sold unbranded by many sellers. The pin order here follows the reference schematic; check your own silkscreen, since some clones differ.
GPIO8 drives the blue user LED and is active LOW: writing LOW turns it on.
GPIO18/19 carry the native USB Serial/JTAG and are not broken out.

8.label: LED
8.note: Blue user LED, active LOW. Also a strapping pin, so avoid holding it at boot.

9.label: BOOT
9.note: Wired to the BOOT button. Held LOW at reset it enters the download mode.
